title: Tamed
description: Tamed is a SMP modpack based around Technology, Magic; Exploring and finding new items and ways to create machines. Find a underbelly of creatures and ancient ruins!
body:
A Technology modpack based around Create and Botania, Biomes upon biomes; Too many new items. Tons of entity cramming devices for Machines and Farming <3

## Randomness
Tamed is a modpack that was put together for a friend's SMP without much cause or thought; So mods may be random and sometimes a bit silly with mobs and item spawn rates.

## The biomes! Oh boy the Biomes!
Tamed has probably way too many biomes to explore without cheats, But hey. I like having options; Make sure to not delve too deep or you might find creatures that lurk beneath

## Built on Forge
Built on a Semi-Updated Version of Forge 1.18.2, Not fully optimized as this was my first pack officially speaking.


## FAQ
> Q: Do I need the modpack on a server?
> 
> A: Yes! You do need a server for the mudpack, However please just use the Essential mod as forge can be a bit funky with this mudpack setup

> Q: Will this come to a previous version of Minecraft?
>
> A: No. This won't go back in updates, I will eventually release a new updated version for 1.20.1 But right, I plan to work on a LTS Optimized Modpack called Verosa

> Q: How do I add mods to the pack?
> 
> A: Drag them into the mods folder inside modrinth by clicking the folder button on mudpack info
